title: Digital Asset Portfolio
description: Portfolio-level strategy: acquiring domains, assigning niches, valuing properties, and making the case for a sustainable digital asset model.
about: Not every site is worth keeping. This channel covers the portfolio decisions -- what to buy, what to build, what to sunset, and how to measure digital asset value in the AI era.
